text: Hello? Hello? Who's this? Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas state relief program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. And I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both part A and part B, yes? So you do have both part A and part B of Medicare, right? Yes. Perfect. You qualify for the benefits. I'm forwarding you to our supervisor. Please hold on.
